mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_lecture_time WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} ORDER BY edu_dt

/** 학생의 출결 차시별 리스트 */ select tls.USER_id ,tls.edu_seq ,tlt.time_seq,tlt.edu_dt,tlt.start_tm ,tlt.end_tm ,tlt.class_how,tlt.check_id ,COALESCE(tas.ATT_CD,'W',tas.ATT_CD) ATT_CD FROM t_lecture_stdnt tls INNER JOIN t_lecture_time tlt ON tls.edu_seq=tlt.edu_seq LEFT OUTER JOIN t_attend_stdnt tas ON tlt.edu_seq=tas.edu_seq AND tlt.time_seq =tas.time_seq AND tls.user_id =tas.user_id WHERE 1=1 and tls.edu_seq =#{eduSeq} AND tls.USER_id=#{reqStudId} ORDER BY tlt.edu_dt,tlt.time_seq

select a.* ,(select qr_begin_de from t_qr_code where edu_seq = a.edu_seq and qr_dt = a.edu_dt and qr_type = '1') qr1_begin_de ,(select qr_end_de from t_qr_code where edu_seq = a.edu_seq and qr_dt = a.edu_dt and qr_type = '1') qr1_end_de ,(select qr_begin_de from t_qr_code where edu_seq = a.edu_seq and qr_dt = a.edu_dt and qr_type = '2') qr2_begin_de ,(select qr_end_de from t_qr_code where edu_seq = a.edu_seq and qr_dt = a.edu_dt and qr_type = '2') qr2_end_de ,(select qr_begin_de from t_qr_code where edu_seq = a.edu_seq and qr_dt = a.edu_dt and qr_type = '3') qr3_begin_de ,(select qr_end_de from t_qr_code where edu_seq = a.edu_seq and qr_dt = a.edu_dt and qr_type = '3') qr3_end_de from ( SELECT edu_seq,edu_dt ,min(start_tm) start_tm ,max(end_tm) end_tm ,COUNT(*) EDU_DT_CNT FROM t_lecture_time TLT WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} GROUP BY edu_seq,edu_dt ORDER BY edu_dt ) a

/** 해당일자의 시작시,종료시 조회 */ SELECT edu_seq,edu_dt ,min(start_tm) start_tm ,max(end_tm) end_tm ,COUNT(*) EDU_DT_CNT FROM t_lecture_time TLT WHERE edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and edu_dt= #{eduDt} GROUP BY edu_seq,edu_dt

/** 학생종합 출결 정보 */ select a.* ,truncate((time_cnt-absent_cnt-truncate((leave_cnt+late_cnt)/3,0))/time_cnt*100,1) att_ratio from ( select tls.edu_seq,tls.user_id ,count(*) time_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'D' then 1 else 0 end) late_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'Z' then 1 else 0 end) leave_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'X' then 1 else 0 end) absent_cnt from t_lecture_stdnt tls inner join t_lecture_time tlt on tls.edu_seq =tlt.edu_seq left join t_attend_stdnt tas on tls.user_id =tas.user_id and tls.edu_seq =tas.edu_seq and tlt.time_seq =tas.time_seq where tls.edu_seq = #{eduSeq} and tls.user_id=#{reqStudId} group by tls.edu_seq,tls.user_id ) a

/** 강의 시간 리스트,일별,주별,월별 */ select a.* from ( select a.* ,(select edu_nm from t_lecture tl2 where tl2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) edu_nm ,(select COALESCE(check_status,0) from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) check_status ,(select edu_dt from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) edu_dt ,(select start_tm from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) start_tm ,(select end_tm from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) end_tm from ( select tlt.edu_seq ,tlt.time_seq ,count(*) stdnt_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='O' then 1 else 0 end) attend_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='D' then 1 else 0 end) late_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='Z' then 1 else 0 end) leave_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='X' then 1 else 0 end) absent_cnt from t_lecture_time tlt inner join t_lecture tl on tlt.edu_seq = tl.edu_seq left join t_lecture_stdnt tls on tlt.edu_seq=tls.edu_seq left join t_attend_stdnt tas on tlt.edu_seq =tas.edu_seq and tlt.time_seq =tas.time_seq and tls.user_id=tas.user_id where 1=1 and tl.org_cd = #{reqOrgCd}
and tl.edu_seq in (select edu_seq from t_lecture_time where check_id=#{reqProfId}) and tlt.edu_dt between #{reqStartDt} and #{reqEndDt} group by tlt.edu_seq ,tlt.time_seq ) a ) a order by a.edu_dt,a.start_tm

/** 강의 시간 리스트,일별,주별,월별 */ select a.* from ( select a.* ,(select edu_nm from t_lecture tl2 where tl2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) edu_nm ,(select COALESCE(check_status,0) from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) check_status ,(select edu_dt from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) edu_dt ,(select start_tm from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) start_tm ,(select end_tm from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) end_tm ,(select instr_nm from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tlt2.time_seq=a.time_seq) prof_nm ,(select att_cd from t_attend_stdnt tas2 where tas2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and tas2.time_seq=a.time_seq and tas2.user_id=#{reqStudId}) att_cd from ( select tlt.edu_seq ,tlt.time_seq ,count(*) stdnt_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='O' then 1 else 0 end) attend_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='D' then 1 else 0 end) late_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='Z' then 1 else 0 end) leave_cnt ,sum(case when tas.att_cd='X' then 1 else 0 end) absent_cnt from t_lecture_time tlt inner join t_lecture tl on tlt.edu_seq = tl.edu_seq left join t_lecture_stdnt tls on tlt.edu_seq=tls.edu_seq left join t_attend_stdnt tas on tlt.edu_seq =tas.edu_seq and tlt.time_seq =tas.time_seq and tls.user_id=tas.user_id where 1=1 and tl.edu_seq in (select edu_seq from t_lecture_stdnt where user_id=#{reqStudId}) and tlt.edu_dt between #{reqStartDt} and #{reqEndDt} group by tlt.edu_seq ,tlt.time_seq ) a ) a order by a.edu_dt,a.start_tm

select a.edu_seq ,sum(absent2_cnt) absent2_cnt ,sum(absent_cnt) absent_cnt ,sum(time_cnt) time_cnt from ( select a.* ,truncate((leave_cnt+late_cnt)/3,0) absent2_cnt ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) time_cnt from ( select tls.edu_seq,tls.user_id ,sum(case when tlt.check_status=1 and tas.att_cd = 'D' then 1 else 0 end) late_cnt ,sum(case when tlt.check_status=1 and tas.att_cd = 'Z' then 1 else 0 end) leave_cnt ,sum(case when tlt.check_status=1 and (tas.att_cd = 'X' or tas.att_cd is null) then 1 else 0 end) absent_cnt from t_lecture_stdnt tls inner join t_lecture_time tlt on tls.edu_seq =tlt.edu_seq left join t_attend_stdnt tas on tls.user_id =tas.user_id and tls.edu_seq =tas.edu_seq and tlt.time_seq =tas.time_seq where tls.edu_seq = #{eduSeq} group by tls.edu_seq,tls.user_id ) a ) a
mapper.insert: insert into t_attend_stdnt select edu_seq,#{timeSeq} time_seq ,user_id,'X' att_cd,#{regDate} reg_date from t_lecture_stdnt tls where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and (auth_status = 0 or auth_status is null)
mapper.select:
select a.* ,truncate(((time_cnt*stdnt_cnt)-(absent_cnt+absent2_cnt))/(time_cnt*stdnt_cnt)*100,1) att_ratio from ( select edu_seq ,sum(absent_cnt) absent_cnt ,sum(absent2_cnt) absent2_cnt ,sum(late_cnt) late_cnt ,sum(leave_cnt) leave_cnt ,(select edu_nm from t_lecture tl2 where tl2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) edu_nm ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_time tlt3 where tlt3.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) time_cnt ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_time tlt3 where tlt3.edu_seq=a.edu_seq and check_status=1) check_time_cnt ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_stdnt tls2 where tls2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) stdnt_cnt from ( select a.* , truncate((leave_cnt + late_cnt)/ 3, 0) absent2_cnt from ( select tl.edu_seq , tls.user_id , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'D' then 1 else 0 end) late_cnt , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'Z' then 1 else 0 end) leave_cnt , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'X' then 1 else 0 end) absent_cnt from t_lecture tl left join t_lecture_stdnt tls on tl.edu_seq = tls.edu_seq inner join t_lecture_time tlt on tls.edu_seq = tlt.edu_seq left join t_attend_stdnt tas on tls.user_id = tas.user_id and tls.edu_seq = tas.edu_seq and tlt.time_seq = tas.time_seq where tl.org_cd = #{reqOrgCd}
and tl.edu_seq in (select edu_seq from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.check_id = #{reqProfId}) group by tls.edu_seq, tls.user_id ) a ) a group by edu_seq ) a

/** 현황통계에서 사용, 내(학생)수업 리스트*/ select a.* ,(select edu_nm from t_lecture tl2 where tl2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) edu_nm ,(select instrctr_nm from t_lecture tl2 where tl2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) prof_nm ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_time tlt3 where tlt3.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) time_cnt ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_stdnt tls2 where tls2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) stdnt_cnt ,truncate((time_cnt-(absent_cnt+absent2_cnt))/time_cnt*100,1) att_ratio from ( select a.* ,truncate((leave_cnt + late_cnt)/ 3, 0) absent2_cnt ,(select count(*) from t_lecture_time tlt2 where tlt2.edu_seq=a.edu_seq) time_cnt from ( select tl.edu_seq , tls.user_id , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'O' then 1 else 0 end) attend_cnt , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'D' then 1 else 0 end) late_cnt , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'Z' then 1 else 0 end) leave_cnt , sum(case when tas.att_cd = 'X' then 1 else 0 end) absent_cnt from t_lecture tl inner join t_lecture_stdnt tls on tl.edu_seq = tls.edu_seq inner join t_lecture_time tlt on tls.edu_seq = tlt.edu_seq left join t_attend_stdnt tas on tls.user_id = tas.user_id and tls.edu_seq = tas.edu_seq and tlt.time_seq = tas.time_seq where 1=1 and tl.edu_seq in (select edu_seq from t_lecture_stdnt where user_id=#{reqStudId}) and tls.user_id=#{reqStudId} group by tls.edu_seq, tls.user_id ) a ) a
